creator: ag-freebsd@muc.de
text:
I have no 10.x system anymore, but this happens on three 11.0-RELEASE hosts I'm running:

I will try with a virtualbox 10.3-RELEASE tomorrow


» freebsd-version -u -k
11.0-RELEASE-p2
11.0-RELEASE-p3
